name: career-ops
tagline: Multi-mode router for an AI job-search command center: JD evaluation, CV/PDF generation, portal scanning, application tracking.
verdict: No security red flags in the router itself -- network and Playwright use are task-appropriate and disclosed via the command menu. Weak spots: no scope-limiting guidance, vague output contracts for most modes, Playwright dependency (apply mode) never declared upfront, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion language anywhere, despite many overlapping career-related modes.
Discovery menu gives one-line descriptions of each mode's output but never specifies file paths, formats, or required sections.
Only config-file existence is guarded ('if exists'); no guidance if Playwright, portal scraping, or JD parsing fails.
